response.justification: Candidate is a strong, experienced full-stack engineer with 13+ years of work, but the resume shows almost no recent C++ experience — the only C/C++ role was a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The required core stack (modern C++/STL, multi-threaded networked systems, MQTT/REST IoT, IEC 62443/SDL, message brokers in C++) is not evidenced. Background is predominantly Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, which does not substitute for the C++ depth this role requires.
strengths: Broad senior engineering experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems with TDD/CI/CD discipline
Demonstrated mentoring, workshops, and architectural ownership (GISCollective, Sociomantic low-latency services)
Familiarity with adjacent advantageous skills: Node.js, React-era frontends, Docker/Kubernetes, event-driven platforms
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience, over a decade ago — far below the 8–12 years of relevant C++ depth implied
No evidence of IEC 62443 / SDL secure development practice or industrial cybersecurity exposure
No demonstrated MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, or industrial-automation protocol experience

key_factors.factor: Strong senior engineering breadth and craftsmanship discipline
